briefdescription.para: a strndup for array of xmlChar's

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar * or NULL

briefdescription.para: a strdup for array of xmlChar's.

detaileddescription.para: Since they are supposed to be encoded in UTF-8 or an encoding with 8bit based chars, we assume a termination mark of '0'.

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar * or NULL

briefdescription.para: a strndup for char's to xmlChar's

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar * or NULL

briefdescription.para: a strdup for char's to xmlChar's

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar * or NULL

briefdescription.para: a strcmp for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the integer result of the comparison

briefdescription.para: Check if both strings are equal of have same content.

detaileddescription.para: Should be a bit more readable and faster than xmlStrcmp

simplesect.para: 1 if they are equal, 0 if they are different

briefdescription.para: Check if a QName is Equal to a given string.

simplesect.para: 1 if they are equal, 0 if they are different

briefdescription.para: a strncmp for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the integer result of the comparison

briefdescription.para: a strcasecmp for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the integer result of the comparison

briefdescription.para: a strncasecmp for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the integer result of the comparison

briefdescription.para: a strchr for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the xmlChar * for the first occurrence or NULL.

briefdescription.para: a strstr for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the xmlChar * for the first occurrence or NULL.

briefdescription.para: a case-ignoring strstr for xmlChar's

simplesect.para: the xmlChar * for the first occurrence or NULL.

briefdescription.para: Extract a substring of a given string.

parameterdescription.para: the index of the first char (zero based)

simplesect.para: the xmlChar * for the first occurrence or NULL.

briefdescription.para: length of a xmlChar's string

simplesect.para: the number of xmlChar contained in the ARRAY.

briefdescription.para: a strncat for array of xmlChar's, it will extend cur with the len first bytes of add.

detaileddescription.para: Note that if len < 0 then this is an API error and NULL will be returned.

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar *, the original cur is reallocated and should not be freed.

briefdescription.para: same as xmlStrncat, but creates a new string.

detaileddescription.para: The original two strings are not freed. If len is < 0 then the length will be calculated automatically.

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar * or NULL

briefdescription.para: a strcat for array of xmlChar's.

detaileddescription.para: Since they are supposed to be encoded in UTF-8 or an encoding with 8bit based chars, we assume a termination mark of '0'.

simplesect.para: a new xmlChar * containing the concatenated string. The original cur is reallocated and should not be freed.

briefdescription.para: Formats msg and places result into buf.

simplesect.para: the number of characters written to buf or -1 if an error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlChar *buf, int len, const char *msg, va_list ap)
memberdef.name: xmlStrVPrintf

briefdescription.para: Formats msg and places result into buf.

simplesect.para: the number of characters written to buf or -1 if an error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlChar **out, int maxSize, const char *msg, va_list ap)
memberdef.name: xmlStrVASPrintf

briefdescription.para: Creates a newly allocated string according to format.

parameterdescription.para: maximum size of the output buffer

simplesect.para: 0 on success, 1 if the result was truncated or on other errors, -1 if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: See xmlStrVASPrintf.

parameterdescription.para: maximum size of the output buffer

simplesect.para: 0 on success, 1 if the result was truncated or on other errors, -1 if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: calculates the internal size of a UTF8 character

simplesect.para: the numbers of bytes in the character, -1 on format error

briefdescription.para: compares the two UCS4 values

simplesect.para: result of the compare as with xmlStrncmp

briefdescription.para: compute the length of an UTF8 string, it doesn't do a full UTF8 checking of the content of the string.

parameterdescription.para: a sequence of UTF-8 encoded bytes

simplesect.para: the number of characters in the string or -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Read the first UTF8 character from utf

parameterdescription.para: a sequence of UTF-8 encoded bytes
a pointer to the minimum number of bytes present in the sequence. This is used to assure the next character is completely contained within the sequence.

simplesect.para: the char value or -1 in case of error, and sets *len to the actual number of bytes consumed (0 in case of error)

briefdescription.para: Checks utf for being valid UTF-8.

detaileddescription.para: utf is assumed to be null-terminated. This function is not super-strict, as it will allow longer UTF-8 sequences than necessary. Note that Java is capable of producing these sequences if provoked. Also note, this routine checks for the 4-byte maximum size, but does not check for 0x10ffff maximum value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to putative UTF-8 encoded string.

simplesect.para: value: true if utf is valid.

briefdescription.para: storage size of an UTF8 string the behaviour is not guaranteed if the input string is not UTF-8

parameterdescription.para: a sequence of UTF-8 encoded bytes
the number of characters in the array

simplesect.para: the storage size of the first 'len' characters of ARRAY

briefdescription.para: a strndup for array of UTF8's

simplesect.para: a new UTF8 * or NULL

briefdescription.para: a function to provide the equivalent of fetching a character from a string array

parameterdescription.para: the position of the desired UTF8 char (in chars)

simplesect.para: a pointer to the UTF8 character or NULL

briefdescription.para: a function to provide the relative location of a UTF8 char

parameterdescription.para: the UTF8 character to be found

simplesect.para: the relative character position of the desired char or -1 if not found

briefdescription.para: Create a substring from a given UTF-8 string Note: positions are given in units of UTF-8 chars.

parameterdescription.para: a sequence of UTF-8 encoded bytes

simplesect.para: a pointer to a newly created string or NULL if the start index is out of bounds or a memory allocation failed. If len is too large, the result is truncated.

briefdescription.para: Replaces a string with an escaped string.

detaileddescription.para: msg must be a heap-allocated buffer created by libxml2 that may be returned, or that may be freed and replaced.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the string in which to escape '' characters.

simplesect.para: the same string with all '' characters escaped.
